frame: z-up; origin=base footprint centre (x,y), z=0 floor; +x bass->treble; soundboard face +y (front); body bulges -y (back)
back_construction: continuous lofted super-ellipse shell (NOT faceted staves); no internal ribs/bulkheads modeled in the soundbox (soundboard carries a CF/woven spine; base has bulkheads). Back transverse crown radius = 200 mm (param).
source_formats: SVG plate (renders/clements49_plate.svg); STL reference (cad/reference/*.stl, gitignored); original OBJ (extract/, gitignored). No STEP/BREP (geometry is mesh + parametric OpenSCAD).
